subcodes.first_line: In this day the ocean of mercy surgeth, and the breezes of forgiveness, wafting from the direction of the bounty of the Desired One of all worlds, are passing through souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز بحر رحمت مواج و نسائم غفران از شطر عنایت مقصود عالمیان در مرور نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
